chapters.title: Chapter 847 - Buttface’S Amazing Gift!
chapters.body:
Chapter 847 - Buttface’S Amazing Gift!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Holy crap!

Xu Que was shocked by Buttface’s rhyming freestyle.

He even knows the department store! Where did he learn that?

Then he looked down and saw a tape recorder nestled in Buttface’s paws.

Now I know the answer!

Xu Que realized that Buttface had found these songs on the tape recorder. Then he had started to show off his newly learned skill. The cultivators had been annoyed by Buttface. Several of them had tried to kill Buttface with magic arts.

Buttface, hair standing on end, jumped up and was about to run away. His eyes were fixed on Xu Que. The next moment, an amazed expression appeared on his face, making him look like an emoji. Then, he started to curse, “Holy crap! Little brat, why do you stand there watching me? Come and help me!”

“Hey! What are you going to do? Don’t come any closer. I suggest you stay away from me. See that guy? He is my little brother, who can kill ten people with one punch!”

“Damn! How did you see through my disguise?” Xu Que was surprised. Jiang Hongyan and he had changed their appearances. He didn’t expect Buttface would recognize him immediately.

His dog eyes are awesome, and his sense of smell!

“Stop your nonsense! Do you think you can avoid being recognized by me through a disguise? It’s useless! An extraordinary man like you will always be so shiny and dazzling like a firefly in the night wherever you go!” Buttface, who was being chased helter-skelter, tried to run up to Xu Que. But he was constantly being obstructed by the cultivators.

“Wow, awesome!” Xu Que was so happy, for Buttface seldom flattered him. As the old saying goes, in desperation, a dog will not only leap over a wall, but also speak his mind!

“Come on, I’m dying!” Buttface shouted.

“Do you have freestyle for this?” Xu Que, who was not in a hurry, stood there and asked.

Buttface was so angry that he shouted immediately, “Yo, Yo, Xu Que is a lady-killer, these people try to be my murderer! How could you be an onlooker? Come and kill these mothers, for this is not a trifling matter!”

Snigger!

Xu Que laughed, for he didn’t expect that Buttface had this amazing gift!

“Hongyan, how do you like it?” Xu Que asked as he looked at Jiang Hongyan with a smile.

Jiang Hongyan was shocked a bit. Then she said, shaking her head with a faint smile, “I can’t quite understand that!”

“It’s OK. Just tell me your feeling about his freestyle!” Xu Que said with a smile.

“…I think it is OK!” Jiang Hongyan said thoughtfully after a short consideration.

“I don’t think it is OK!” Xu Que shook his head.

Hearing that, Buttface shouted angrily, “This is not fair!”

“OK, that’s enough, stop your nonsense!” Xu Que laughed as he dashed forward like a phantom.

Like a bolt of lightning, he moved through the cultivators and appeared in front of Buttface instantly. All the cultivators were stunned by his speed.

“Yo, Yo, Buttface, Buttface, just come with me!” Xu Que started his impromptu rap as he patted Buttface’s head.

Buttface walked away, following Xu Que delightedly as he sang loudly like a crow, “Let’s go, let’s go, this time I owe you!”

The cultivators were dumbfounded as they looked at Xu Que and Buttface as if they had run across two idiots. When they realized Xu Que was about to take Buttface away, they shouted angrily, “Stop!”

“My fellow cultivator, what are you going to do?” They stopped Xu Que and asked.

“You look strange here. I guess you are newcomer, right? I suggest you stay away from this issue in this place, otherwise, you will have to face the consequences!” One of the cultivators said, as he put his hand on his sword hilt and looked at Xu Que coldly.

Xu Que said with a smile, “As a member of the Exploding Heavens Faction, I’m not afraid of any consequences!”

Then, he attacked with his palm directly.

Boom!

A cloud of magnificent strength gushed forward abruptly. The cultivators at the Form Synthesis Stage were blown away as if they had been hit by a mountain. Then, they fell on the big trees behind them heavily and started to spit blood.

Crack!

The big trees were broken by them. The cultivators turned pale from terror.

How formidable his power is!

He is a cultivator at the Form Synthesis Stage like us, but why is he so powerful?

“You can show due respect to the Exploding Heavens Faction by forgetting what happened today. And you should be grateful for this!” Xu Que left with Buttface and Jiang Hongyan slowly, showing his unfathomable figure to the cultivators after saying those words.

The cultivators didn’t dare stop Xu Que. All of them had to make way because they were terrified. Besides Xu Que’s horrible strength, they were also terrified by Jiang Hongyan. After all, cultivators at the Crossing Calamity Stage were at the top of the food chain in the Road of Heavenly Ascension.

As Xu Que, Jiang Hongyan, and Buttface went further and further along the Road of Heavenly Ascension, the cultivators who traveled together with them became fewer and fewer. Some cultivators had traveled deeper into this area, while others were still wandering around at the entrance. Also, some had closed their eyes and become corpses in the Road of Heavenly Ascension! This was quite normal in the World of cultivators.

Xu Que walked slowly on the road. When there were no other cultivators who traveled together with them, he grabbed Buttface’s collar abruptly and shouted, “Buttface, I asked you to take them to the Mystery Land in the South Continent. Why are you here?”

Buttface was shocked and retorted immediately, “Damn! How do you have the nerve to say that? I’ve already taken them to the Mystery Land. Do you know how boring that place is? Especially Duan Jiude’s Master, who is absolutely a madwoman. She sang Love In A Lifetime every day! If I didn’t run away, I would have been driven mad by her!”

Buttface paused a bit, and continued to say with a smile of schadenfreude, “Oh, Duan Jiude is in serious trouble now! He planned to run out with me. But I kicked him back halfway. Then, he was captured by his Master, who threw him into the forbidden area of the Mystery Land. I guess he will suffer a lot this time!”

“Hah-hah, really?” Xu Que laughed with smug pleasure after hearing that.

This is really exciting news!

“Buttface, well done! Come on and give me five!”

“OK!”

Clap!

“By the way, Buttface, where did you kick? Did you kick his vital part?”

“Certainly, I had planned that kick for several months! It is a pity you were not there. Duan Jiude almost cried because of the pain.…”

…

Jiang Hongyan, who was standing beside them, had been totally surprised by their reaction. One second ago, they were shouting at each other angrily. The next moment, they started to talk and grin cheekily. Jiang Hongyan really didn’t know what to say.

However, when they started to talk about other topics, Jiang Hongyan said as she shook her head with a smile, “OK, it’s not a good time for small talk now!”

“As you wish, Holy Senior!” Buttface straightened his body and said, looking at Jiang Hongyan in reverence.

Xu Que’s lips twitched.This stupid dog is still planning to become a Prime Minister by flattering Jiang Hongyan!

“Buttface, could you give us a detailed description of how you came to this place?” Jiang Hongyan asked with a faint smile.

“Of course, Holy Senior! Actually, this is a long story, which should be started from my birth.…” Buttface was about to narrate his glorious experience in detail, so that he could leave a good impression on the Holy Senior.

Bang!

Before Buttface finished his words, Xu Que hit his forehead directly.

“Ouch! Little brat, what are you doing?”

“Stop your nonsense, or I’ll kill you! Just cut to the chase and tell us how you came here!”

“I came here on foot! Ouch! It hurts! Don’t beat me! I will tell you everything! Actually, I went to the East Continent three months ago.…”

chapters.title: Chapter 958: I Am Not That Kind Of Person
chapters.body:
Chapter 958: I Am Not That Kind Of Person

Chapter 958: I Am Not That Kind Of Person

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

"Crap!"

Buttface was immediately annoyed. He was about to dash toward the strongly built man, showing his teeth. Xu Que dragged him back with great difficulty. Then Buttface roared angrily, "What do you mean? Don't you have eyes? I am not a dog! I am a wolf!"

"A talking dog! Humph! You are seeking death!" The strongly built man snorted as metal layers appeared on his arms. Then he dashed toward the window with a killing intent.

"Screw you! Come on and let me smash you to death with my fist!" Buttface talked tough as he stayed behind Xu Que.

Boom!

At the same time, the strongly built man attacked with his fists, which seemed to distort the void around them.

Standing there with his hands behind his back, Xu Que said with a faint smile as he shook his head, "You are too slow!"

Patter!

Along with this crisp sound, the strongly built man's killing punch was blocked by Xu Que's palm.

"What?" Instantly, the strongly built man's expression changed, registering disbelief. He had thrown out his fist angrily just now so it was very powerful. However, he certainly didn't expect that his attack would be blocked so easily by Xu Que. The most important point that confused him was that he didn't see Xu Que's defensive move at all! One second ago, he was standing there with his hands behind his back. The next moment, he had blocked an attack!

The strongly built man, who had broken out in a cold sweat, asked in a trembling voice, "Who...who are you? No young man in First Realm City could be as powerful as you are!"

"It doesn't matter who I am. The point is that your woman's adulterer is not me! That man dressed in black has run away in that direction!" Xu Que replied with a faint smile.

The strongly built man realized that this young man was not the adulterer he had seen just now because his figure and clothes were totally different. Moreover, this young man was so powerful. If he was really the adulterer, he didn't need to run away in a hurry. At the thought of this, the strongly built man turned pale. He folded his hands and said to Xu Que, "Sorry, I was too reckless just now!"

"It's OK! When something like this happens, everyone can be reckless!" Xu Que grinned, and the man saw his white, straight teeth.

"Alas! This is really a scandal for my family. Thank you for your understanding!" The strongly built man said and bowed in apology to Xu Que again.

"You are welcome!" Xu Que replied politely.

However, before the strongly built man had time to say anything else, Xu Que said perplexedly, "However...I could forgive your recklessness just now, but you scared my pet! Let's talk about this issue! Look, he is so scared that he even lost some weight! I'm afraid he will need a lot of nourishment for his recovery!"

"...." The strongly built man was speechless after hearing Xu Que's words. When he saw the chubby Buttface who was hiding behind Xu Que, he couldn't help but smile. He had never seen such a fat dog before! How could this guy say his dog had lost weight after getting frightened? Apparently, he is trying to fool me!

"Eh...I don't know what kind of compensation you need." The strongly built man decided to compromise. He knew clearly that he couldn't rival Xu Que in fighting. So he decided not to provoke such a formidable enemy.

Xu Que replied with a smile, "I don't want anything special. Several buckets of the Ten-Millennium-Flower-Dew are fine for me!"

"What? "The...the Ten-Millennium-Flower-Dew?" Hearing this, the strongly built man almost spat blood on the spot.

Are you kidding me?

The Ten-Millennium-Flower-Dew?

It is even more expensive than me!

Also, you said you wanted several buckets of it! Why didn't you just ask me to give you the Moon?

"What? You don't have several buckets of Ten-Millennium-Flower-Dew? Then how dare you attack me just now?" Xu Que asked arrogantly. Since he couldn't fool the man, he would use extortion directly.

The strongly built man said desperately, "So, are you going to invent challenges for me? Everyone in the First Realm knows only the Dong Family is able to extract and store the Ten-Millennium-Flower-Dew. Each drop of this flower dew is extremely precious! How could an ordinary person like me have it?"

"The Dong Family?" Xu Que was shocked by his reply. Then he furrowed his eyebrows. This was the second time he had heard of the Dong Family. When he had used his pressure, the others thought he was using some treasures of the Dong Family and tried to rob them from him. Now, the Ten-Millennium-Flower-Dew was also related to the Dong Family! Apparently, this Dong Family was quite extraordinary in this area.

"What? My lord, is...is this the first time you have come to First Realm City?" The strongly built man asked when he sensed something was wrong.

Xu Que didn't reply and just looked at the strongly built man with a faint smile.

The strongly built man said immediately, "Let me give you a brief introduction. The Dong Family is the largest family in First Realm City. They have countless chambers of commerce and numerous underground markets under their control. You can say that First Realm City is completely controlled by the Dong Family!"

"Oh, what else?" Xu Que asked calmly.

The strongly built man continued his introduction, "All places which could generate the Ten-Millennium-Flower-Dew in this area are forbidden places that belong to the Dong Family. They have special methods to extract and store the flower dew. Therefore, the Ten-Millennium-Flower-Dew has been basically monopolized by the Dong Family!"

"I know! Just tell me something I don't know!" Xu Que shook his head.

The strongly built man had to hold back the curse words he wanted to lob at Xu Que.

Did you really know that?

You know nothing! Why are you still acting tough?

"Eh...eh, my lord, please tell me what do you want to know!"

"I have been quite straightforward. Do you expect me to rush into the Dong Family to rob the Ten-Millennium-Flower-Dew?" Xu Que said with a smile.

The strongly built man's expression changed once again and he said hurriedly, "My lord, you should never do that! As far as I know, there are several powerhouses in the Dong Family who are Supreme Silver Warriors and have reached the Senior Silver Level. An old man of this family has even become a Gold Warrior!"

The Silver Warrior? The Gold Warrior?

Xu Que was almost amused by these terms.

Are these terms from the Saint Seiya?

"My lord!" The strongly built man said seriously in a low voice at this time, "If you want the Ten-Millennium-Flower-Dew, I know a good way to obtain it fair and square!"

"Oh? Tell me!" Xu Que raised his eyebrows.

"The heiress of the Dong Family will hold a banquet in the city tonight. Although it is only a banquet, it is used to choose a husband for the heiress of this family! Only young and powerful people are allowed to attend this banquet. My lord, you are young and powerful. If you could impress that heiress, you could obtain the Ten-Millennium-Flower-Dew easily!" After saying that, the strongly built man looked at Xu Que thoughtfully and winked at him.

Xu Que snorted coldly. "Behave yourself! What do you mean by saying that? Am I a person who would perform sexual favors to obtain Ten-Millennium-Flower-Dew? Humph! I, Xu Que, will never do something like that!"

"My lord, please forgive me! I...I just spoke about it thoughtlessly. Please forgive my rudeness!" The strongly built man was shocked and apologized hurriedly. He had thought Xu Que was a shameless person. After all, he could remember Xu Que's shameless face clearly trying to extort him. He didn't expect that this guy had integrity and a bottom line and didn't want to do shameless things.

"OK, since you said that out of good intentions, I will forgive you!" Xu Que waved his hands generously.

The strongly built man let out a sigh of relief and thought he had been quite lucky this time.

Then Xu Que asked, "By the way, when does the banquet start tonight? Do I need an invitation letter? Hey! Why are you looking at me in this way? Don't tell me you think I will attend this banquet! Damn! Are you a psycho? I am not that kind of person! It is just a casual question!"

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 970: Follow Me, Miss Dong!
chapters.body:
Chapter 970: Follow Me, Miss Dong!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

T...touch him to death in seconds?

This fellow is boasting that he could touch the Dong family's Third Head Enforcer to death in seconds?

Everyone present sat there with their eyes wide open, incredulous and shocked.

This was too crazy. First, he had killed Lu Zhouhe in front of the Third Head Enforcer without any mercy, flagrantly violating the Dong family's taboos. And now, he was provoking him on purpose. He was simply asking to get killed!

"You…you have some nerve!" The Third Head Enforcer stared coldly at Xu Que with a murderous look. Clearly, he was losing his temper. He appreciated Xu Que, but he still considered himself Xu Que's superior elder. But now, Xu Que had disregarded him and killed Lu Zhouhe without a second thought. Xu Que was not acting like an obedient youngster at all, and that instantly worsened his impression of him.

"Whether I have nerve or not is none of your goddamn business; just get out of my way. For the sake of Miss Dong, I'll be merciful and not pick a fight with you!" Xu Que said proudly, like a haughty, handsome man.

Previously, he had maintained a low profile at the banquet to obtain the omnipotent Ten-Millennium-Flower-Dew. Now that he had the Ten-Millennium-Flower-Dew in hand, what was the point of keeping his head down?

As far as strength was concerned, even if the Third Head Enforcer had reached the Celestial Stage, Xu Que had nothing to fear. After all, as long as he had the Divine Escape Emblem, the whole world was his! Even if he can't beat him, he'll act tough, and then run away. What can anybody do about it.

"Insolent!" The Third Head Enforcer flew into a rage and his arms immediately transformed into metal. He flung them at Xu Que on a roaring wind.

Whoosh!

Xu Que raised an eyebrow and took another step back, easily dodging the blow. He sneered, "Third Head Enforcer, I suggest you stay in your lane. If you attack me again, then don't blame me if I blow up your whole house. At worst, I'll take care of Miss Dong in the future!"

After he spoke, the Dong family's Third Head Enforcer was stunned with bewilderment. He didn't know whether to be shocked at Xu Que's words, impressed that he dodged his killing move once again, or both!

A young man who had twice evaded his attacks with ease…even fools could see that he was out of the ordinary.

Standing next to him, Miss Dong's entire face had become red. Utterly furious, she stomped her tiny feet and retorted, "Wh…what nonsense is this? Who asked you to take care of me?"

"Oh, it's better if I don't have to. I wasn't being serious!" Xu Que shrugged his shoulders.

"You…" Miss Dong's face stiffened in an instant. She turned to the Third Head Enforcer and pleaded coyly, "Third Uncle, you have to do something about him!"

"Of course I do!" The Third Head Enforcer finally came to his senses. His muscled body shook, and he glowered at Xu Que. Then he said, "Youngster, you're a brazen one. My Lin'er is the Dong family's precious daughter. How dare you not take her seriously!"

"I can't even say it as a joke?" Xu Que raised a brow and asked.

"No way!" Miss Dong and the Third Head Enforcer spoke in unison.

Miss Dong felt both ashamed and annoyed. She was but an innocent young lady, yet someone had teased her time and again. And now, that guy was mocking her in front of so many people, going as far as to say that he would "take care of her." How could she possibly tolerate this?

"Youngster!" The Third Head Enforcer spoke in a deep voice. "No one can take back what they said. Today, no matter what, you must settle this affair with the Dong family."

"Huh?" Xu Que was taken aback. "What do you mean?"

The Third Head Enforcer immediately scowled at him and snarled, "What do I mean? You just said that you would take care of Lin'er. Are you already going back on your word?"

Everyone was flabbergasted.

Oh, my god!

What does that even mean?

Had things gotten to the point where the Third Head Enforcer of the Dong family was willing to give Miss Dong to Xu Que in marriage?

Holy sh*t, is he crazy? How can something this good happen in this world? Has he hit the jackpot?

Even Xu Que and Miss Dong were struck dumb and frozen in place.

This was beyond Xu Que's wildest imagination. He had thought that he was behaving badly enough to act tough, yet things still came to this! Just how much did the Dong family want to marry their daughter off? But glancing at her, she doesn't seem like someone who would be short of suitors!

Unless…

Xu Que seemed to have thought of something, and his expression changed. He gave a grave look at the Third Head Enforcer and declared, "Third Head Enf— I mean, Uncle Dong, I was wrong for offending you. Please forgive me!"

"Oh? I like this attitude!" The Third Enforcer was slightly astonished by Xu Que's swift change of attitude, then he let out a meaningful laugh.

"Then let's not beat around the bush and lay it on the line. Be straight with me, does this lady right here suffer from some unspeakable disease?" Xu Que asked mysteriously. However, everyone present heard him just fine.

Everyone stared at him in shock. What was that question for?

The Third Head Enforcer was astounded, then quickly retorted, "Youngster, don't get too cocky! How could my Lin'er be diseased? Her health is impeccable!"

Miss Dong, standing aside, was fuming as well. She could no longer maintain her earlier calmness. Instead, she was staring daggers at Xu Que with a flushed face, gnashing her teeth.

"All right, I understand now!" Xu Que raised his hand.

Without notice, a watch had materialized on his wrist. With the sound of "duang", the dial popped up and shot out a stream of light, directly hitting the young man standing closest to him!

Splat!

The young man looked dazed as if he were drunk. He took a few steps back, then dropped to the floor.

Before the gawking eyes of everyone on the scene, Xu Que put on a pair of square-frame glasses and grabbed the small red bow tie around his neck.

"Da-da-da-da-da-da…" The opening theme of "Detective Conan" blasted from his MP3 player.

Xu Que focused on the Dong family's Third Head Enforcer and said in a low voice, "Third Head Enforcer, no need to hide it from me. Since you're in such a hurry to marry her off, then there can only be one truth!"

Zap!

As he spoke, a white light flashed in Xu Que's eyes. Suddenly, he flung his arm up and pointed at Miss Dong, then shouted, "Your little Miss Dong must be either a big-dicked cutie or a cross-dressing trap. All of this is a conspiracy!"

Wham!

In that instant, the whole place became as silent as the grave. Completely stupefied, everyone gaped at Xu Que in confusion. They had absolutely no idea what he was doing, much less what he was saying.

What big-dicked cutie?

What cross-dressing trap?

What do they mean?

Most important, can't you talk like a normal person? Why did you have to tranquilize someone with a hidden weapon?

Ding! "Congratulations to host Xu Que for baffling everyone on scene! You have been rewarded with 500 Acting Tough Points!"

The system resounded in his head.

Xu Que's lips twitched. That really worked? And he was only rewarded with 500 Acting Tough Points? Is this a joke?

"Youngster, what do you mean?" The Third Head Enforcer opened his mouth and scowled at Xu Que. Although he didn't understand Xu Que's words, he had a vague impression that they did not mean anything good.

Xu Que shook his head and replied casually, "The meaning isn't important, what matters is the sincerity. As one of the Exploding Heavens Faction, when did I ever lack women throwing themselves at my feet? Go out and ask around yourself. If all the women who wanted to marry me lined up, they could circle the Taijin Continent more than once!"

"But I, Wang Dachui, have wandered about my whole life, training my heart to be impervious. Beauty can no longer move me."

"Today, you asked to offer Miss Dong's hand in marriage to me. If I accept, not only is it unfair to all the other ladies, but it will also affect the Taoist Mind that I have cultivated painstakingly for all these years."

As Xu Que finished talking, people were stunned. Even the Third Head Enforcer gawked in disbelief. There is someone in the world who would reject the Dong family's daughter?

"All right, I'll spare you the rest. Follow me, Miss Dong!" Xu Que was already standing before Miss Dong.

Miss Dong was just as startled and didn't react for a moment. She asked in a confused voice, "Wh…where are we going?"

Xu Que answered in earnest, "To the bridal chamber! Don't worry, I promise I won't put it in, just rub it on the outside! I must prove to them that my unaffectable Taoist Mind is as steadfast as can be!"

chapters.title: Chapter 971: I’M Not Going In, Good-Bye!
chapters.body:
Chapter 971: I’M Not Going In, Good-Bye!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

"Just a rub? Promise not to put it in?"

Everyone present felt their eyes bulge in surprise, and they almost vomited blood.

Does this fellow have no shame?

He's utterly shameless!

"Do you dare to clarify where he's going to rub? And where he wanted to put it in?"

"Little one, watch your tongue," warned the Third Head of the Dong Family. Even he could hardly resist the urge to fight Xu Que.

Miss Dong seemed to be out of it. Bewildered, it was evident that she did not understand the underlying nuance of Xu Que's words.

Xu Que answered righteously and honorably, "Is there anything wrong with what I said? Can we no longer speak the truth? Dong the Third One, do you dare make a bet with me? I would definitely not put it in!"

Dong the Third One immediately turned green and his veins bulged in anger.

Everyone present was rendered speechless.

Place a bet?

You must be damn crazy! Who would gamble on that?

What do you mean that you won't put it in? Even a rub is a win for you!

"Third Uncle, what are you guys talking about?" Miss Dong finally gave in to her urge to ask. She was genuinely confused about everyone's expressions.

Dong the Third One glared at Xu Que, his face green. "Wang Dachui, stop talking. Come with me. I'll take you to my two elder brothers!"

"Ah?" Xu Que and Miss Dong exclaimed in unison.

Were they meeting her parents?

Both Xu Que and Miss Dong could not believe their ears. Are they going to make wedding preparations? Has the Dong Family always been this hasty?

"Don't ah at me, Lin'er. Continue to entertain the guests. Wang Dachui, hold your tongue and follow me!" Dong the Third One glared at Xu Que and made his way out of the building.

Xu Que and Miss Dong stared at each other, with shock on their faces. Everyone else, however, looked upon them with envy, albeit with some uncertainty. According to logic, Xu Que's abhorrent behavior should have cost him his life at the hands of the Dongs. However, the attitude of the Dong Family seemed otherwise. They obviously valued Xu Que much, even to the extent of betrothing Miss Dong to him.

"Could it be...that this fellow was truly from some extraordinary background?" Many people couldn't help but form such speculations. They all directed intense and curious gazes at Xu Que. Even Miss Dong looked at Xu Que. She could not figure out what was going on. The elders in the family should have been the most repulsed by Xu Que's attitude and behavior. Putting it a better way, this fellow was true to his character and quite the wild horse. But, putting it crassly, this fellow was just a scummy jerk, an uncontrollable gangster.

However, why did the elders of the family, especially the Third Uncle who was usually curt and decisive, treat him so differently?

For what reason exactly?

Miss Dong's beautiful brows began to frown as she continued to try to figure out the situation..

"Miss Dong!" Xu Que turned around to look at her, smiling slightly.

"Ah?" Miss Dong regained her senses and broke out of her contemplation.

"Don't worry. I'll be fine!" Xu Que pretended to be deeply affectionate.

Miss Dong shot back, her expression dark, "I'm not worried about you!"

Xu Que nodded. "I'm afraid that we have to postpone our wedding consummation. Don't be anxious, though. If there are no hiccups, I promise to return and fulfill my promise!" Xu Que turned and left.

"You...you're talking nonsense! When have I been anxious, you…." Miss Dong immediately went red in the face, stomping her little feet. "Who's gonna consummate the marriage with you? You gangster!"

In the end, everyone witnessed Xu Que leaving without a care in the world.

Miss Dong was too distracted to host the banquet. She apologized to the guests and arranged for the servants to lead them to their seats. She then quickly excused herself.

She must find out why the elders of the family seem to hold Xu Que in such high regard. They had even wanted to betrothe her to him. The situation was too weird, and there must be something more than met the eye.

…..

At the same time, Xu Que had caught up with Dong the Third One. He was strolling slowly and leisurely on the long cobbled path. Landscaping, mountains, and lakes surrounded him. Willows hung low, and everything was serene and graceful. Dong the Third One remained silent and wordless as he walked in front. He led Xu Que through a winding route, and finally stopped in front of an ancient tower. The exterior of the tower was filled with wooden installations and traps. The floor was coated with a layer of metal, and one could almost see strands of lightning interweaving on the surface, crackling as they go around.

It was now clear that this tower was the real vital architecture of the Dongs.

Dong the Third One stopped outside the tower and turned to look at Xu Que. He was expressionless, which made him look stern and austere.

"Third Uncle, speak your mind. Why have we traveled this far? Am I supposed to clear the stages and traps?" Xu Que stopped several feet away and asked smilingly.

Dong the Third One answered, "My name is Dong Yue, the third of the Dongs. You could call me the Third Head. Unless you complete the wedding with Lin'er, you are not to call me Third Uncle. We are not that close!"

"Geez, Third Uncle, have you forgotten about your nephew, Wu Xie, by the shore of the Great Lake? The innocent and naive Wu Xie?" Xu Que shouted.

Dong Yue immediately frowned. "What Wu Xie? Isn't your name Wang Dachui? Why have you changed your name?" As he said that, he shook his head. "Forget it, that's not important. Go in first. There is someone who wants to meet you. However, you would need to climb to the top of the tower yourself. Otherwise, you would be unworthy to be the son-in-law of the Dong family."

"Yo, this is a test?" Xu Que asked, laughing.

Dong Yue nodded. "That's right. This is our test for you. Being our son-in-law is no easy feat! However, before we begin, I have to remind you that this place is filled with traps and danger. Even if it were me, I could not guarantee that I would emerge unscathed." He paused for a moment. "That's why you should think it over. Once you step foot into the tower, I could not save you no matter what danger befalls you. You could only rely on yourself!"

"Oh, there's no need to think this over. I am not going in, good-bye!" Xu Que waved his hand and instantly turned to leave.

"What?" Dong Yue was stunned, his face filled with shock. He seemed not to have predicted Xu Que's response. "Wait a minute, stay right there. Wang Dachui, what is the meaning of this?" Dong Yue asked.

Xu Que paused in his steps. He turned and laughed. "Isn't that obvious? You call yourself the Third Head of the Dong family, but you can't even see what I'm after! Can't you tell whether or not I want to be the son-in-law of the Dongs? In fact, I am only here for the Ten-Millennium-Flower-Dew. Everything else was a joke. Why should I clear this pathetic tower for no good reason? Good-bye!"

"A joke? Who do you think you are? Do not move!" An angry Dong Yue bellowed.

"I am leaving, leaving!" Xu Que waved with his back turned to Dong Yue as a gesture of farewell. He then ignored him and strode off. What he had said was the truth. He arrived at the Dongs for the sole purpose of obtaining the Ten-Millennium-Flower-Dew.

As for Miss Dong, while she was pretty, Xu Que was determined to return to the Four Great Continents. He could spare no thought for the great Missy of the Dong family.

Besides, Xu Que had seen his fair share of beautiful ladies. He had long matured, well past the time where he could no longer walk away when he saw a pretty lady. A beauty like Miss Dong was a notch lower than Jiang Hongyan. How could he be mesmerized by her?

"Wang Dachui, stop there right now!"

Boom!

At that moment, the gust of palm pressure came toward Xu Que's back along with Dong Yue's bellow.

Xu Que smirked and stepped onto a bolt of lightning. He dodged the attack swiftly and warned icily, "Dong the Third One, they say that you don't forgive the sin that is committed a third time. You tried to attack me three times, and I let you off because Miss Dong gifted me the Ten-Millennium-Flower-Dew. Try that again, and I will definitely kill you!"

chapters.title: Chapter 983 - You’D Even Want That?
chapters.body:
Chapter 983 - You’D Even Want That?

Chapter 983 - You’d Even Want That?

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

At the same time, the center of the Ghost King Market.

A Blood Sea that stretched thousands of square feet nestled in that area. Humongous and enormous, no wonder people called it a sea.

The Blood sea was bloody red and thick like fresh blood. When the seawater moved, they moved like molten lava.

A thick miasma covered the surface of the sea. There were strands of black within the deep red, from far it looked like a patch of light reddish-brown. The smell was piercing and nauseating.

Mortals would give up the moment the smell hit them.

Ordinary fighters at the Bronze Level would not dare to approach the Blood Sea easily. Silver Level powerhouses needed to put on antitoxin lotion before they could pass through the Miasma.

Of course, no matter the level of the fighter, be it Silver or Gold, they would need to obtain the Ghost King Order before they could fly into the center area.

Otherwise, once the center area's Ghost King Palace activates its defense mechanism, the overwhelming strength of the device would be enough to dump them all into the Blood Sea, eroding them into nothingness.

At the border of the Blood Sea, stood two beautiful figures and a toy poodle.

A halo of brilliance spread from Jiang Hongyan's body and enveloped both her and Xu Feifei, resisting the corrosion of the Miasma.

In fact, with her strength, she would have no problems barging into the Ghost King Palace.

However, she still had to take care of Xu Feifei. Xu Feifei was still a mortal. If Jiang Hongyan had to spare some attention to take care of her, she might not be able to hold off the opponent's attack stemming from the Blood Sea's prowess.

If she made Xu Feifei stay behind and charged in alone, Xu Feifei would be in danger, seeing how chaotic the Second Realm is.

Therefore, the only thing she could do was to stand by the shore of the Blood Sea, locked in a temporary stalemate with the Ghost King Palace.

Outside the perimeter, many surrounded the area and waited for the show. There was a nonstop buzz of chatterings.

"These two women are beautiful beyond belief! To think that we could see such beauties in the Second Realm.

"Especially so for the lady holding up the light shield. Mature and dignified, she has this exceptional air about her. I reckon that no one in the entire Taijin Continent could compare to her beauty."

"you guys better keep your mouths shut. That woman could stand this long by the Blood Sea and still spare effort to protect the person beside her. She abilities must be at least at the peak of the Silver Level, or even Gold Level."

"What? She's that strong?"

"How did they become enemies wth the Ghost King Palace?"

"Hah, I heard that the Second Young Master of the Ghost King Palace provoked them from outside the First Realm. They then chased him down all the way here."

"Fuck, didn't the Second Young Master enter the First Realm to pay respect to his ancestors? I heard that the Li family had recently found a new graveyard and were planning to relocate the ashes of their ancestors. How did they come to be at loggerheads?"

"What did he do for them to cross realms and chase him down?"

"I heard from the Second Young Master's guard that it was the Second Young Master who spoke ill to the younger lady and even made a move on her. Luckily, that powerful woman stopped his advances. She then seemed to discover some treasure on him and asked for it, but the Second Young Master refused. He offended them again with words, and hence the chase down."

"I see! Trouble brew as the words leaves the mouth!"

"Trouble? You must be kidding, why would the Second Young Master of the Ghost King Palace be afraid of trouble? Didn't you see that those two were blocked outside the Blood Sea?"

"You have a point. Furthermore, Boss Li had not made his appearance. This woman was no match for them."

"If they still refuse to leave, they'll be in big trouble."

Everyone discussed among themselves, but none thought that the Ghost King Palace would be in trouble. They even believed that Jiang Hongyan and Xu Feifei would be utterly crushed.

"Make way, make way, make way for your Master!" a series of holler suddenly came from their behind.

Everyone turned around and was stunned for a moment.

"Isn't that the First Young Master of the Ghost King Palace?"

"Fuck, why is he in such a state? Did someone beat him up?"

"What's happening today? First, someone chased down the Second Young Master of the Ghost King Palace. Now, even the First Young Master was beaten up."

"Looks like Boss Li will be furious this time."

Many had horror on their faces as they made way for that Young Master to enter.

"Fuck, how dare he beat me up in Ghost King City? " The middle-aged man looked pathetic and beaten, with blood all over as he made his way through the crowd angrily. He kept cursing and looked nothing like the wimp he was before Xu Que.

"Servants, are you blind? Didn't you see that your young master has returned? Come out quickly to welcome me!"

"Fuck, you're all blind to miss me being up at the doorstep!"

"Where's my father? Father, are you going to do nothing? Someone just beat your child up! Quickly break this fellow's legs, shred him and help me vent my anger!"

The middle-aged man yelled loudly, unabashed at the fact that he was beaten up by someone.

Everyone present kept silent, seeing how angry he was. They didn't dare to talk behind his back.

After all, all of them knew the Young Master's character well enough. He bullies the kind yet cowers in front of the menacing. However, once his father Boss Li appears, this squandering son would become prouder than anyone else.

"Swoosh!"

The sound of something cutting the wind suddenly came from above.

Everyone was shocked. Everyone present lifted their heads skywards, taken aback.

There was a silhouette riding on a lightning bolt above the clouds. He brought a big dog with him and flew through the skies at an astounding speed.

The lightning bolt rider was very young. Slightly smiling, looking refined, warm, and gentle, this fine young man was none other than Xu Que.

Once the middle-aged man saw Xu Que coming, he was scared out of his wits. The arrogance on his face disappeared in an instant as he ran towards the Blood Sea fanatically.

"Haha, trying to run?" Xu Que sneered and suddenly extended his arm. He closed his fist into a grab.

Boom!

A vast, overwhelming force formed form the skies and trapped the middle-aged man, dragging him to the back.

At last, with a plop, the middle-aged man was dragged to Xu Que's front as he lay half-paralyzed on the ground.

Xu Que smirked as he looked into his eyes in disdain, "I just let you run home, and you dare to scold me behind my back? Alright, come on, don't you wanna teach me a lesson?"

"No, big brother, I was wrong! I was really wrong. I shouldn't have run my mouth, I... ...ah!" The way that middle-aged man begged for mercy, looking like a loser he was in front of Xu Que.

However, before he could finish, Xu Que gave him a mighty kick and sent him rolling on the ground. He broke more ribs at the spot and vomited blood again after letting out a scream.

"Tss!"

Everyone present inhaled sharply. Horror filled their faces, and they could not believe their eyes.

You're at the entrance of the Ghost King Palace, how dare you punch the First Young Master this ruthlessly?

Who in the world was this youngster?

Isn't he a little too strong?

"Brother!"

Xu Feifei suddenly called out in surprise.

Jiang Hongyan too looked at him as she left the border, a smile on her face.

"You're here?" she asked mildly as if she already knew Xu Que would come.

"Now that's your fault, little lady. Why didn't you tell me that you are coming?" Xu Que promptly reached out to pinch Jiang Hongyan's cheeks.

Jiang Hongyan smiled, leaning gracefully aside, and avoided Xu Que's hand.

At this time, Xu Feifei raised her hand to block Xu Que. She glared at him and said, "Xu Que, what are you doing? Don't bully my Sister Hongyan. I, Xu Feifei, am the only one to blame for this!"

"Blame your head!" Xu Que could not help but rolled his eyes. "Come on, what happened? Who is this guy scummy enough for you to chase him from the First Realm?"

"Well, he's a despicable and lewd villain. His mouth is too dirty. I'd let it go if he only spoke badly of me, but he dared to provoke Sister Hongyan." Xu Feifei was instantly enraged and waved her fist. She wished she could run across the Blood Sea to teach him a lesson.

"Just a quarrel?" Xu Que looked at Jiang Hongyan.

With Hongyan's character, there was no reason for her to do this over a simple quarrel; to be in such a haste, and even chased him down to such a remote place from the first Realm.

Jiang Hongyan smiled faintly, "The quarrel was just part of the reason. The real reason was that that person carries a can of bone ashes. Ashes of an Immortal Cultivator!"

"Oh? Ashes of an Immortal Cultivator?"

Xu Que's eyes lit up.

"Ashes?"

The middle-aged man under Xu Que's feet was flabbergasted at what he heard. He blurted in horror, "You... What are you going to do? Those are ashes of our ancestors. You'd even want that?"

chapters.title: Chapter 984 - I'Ll Kill One For You To See
chapters.body:
Chapter 984 - I'Ll Kill One For You To See

Chapter 984: I'll Kill One For You To See

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

"What? Can't I even ask for some bone ashes? Is this tiny, tiny request of mine too much to ask?" Xu Que asked while poring blatantly at the middle-aged man.

Everyone present almost bulged their eyes in shock. They all hummed, agreeing in unison. How was his request not too much?

"Not too much, not too much at all!" the middle-aged man immediately slapped his chest and answered unfalteringly, "Big brother, not just bone ashes, I could even get you my ancestor's blood!"

"Oh? All right then, I'll take some blood." Xu Que smiled.

The middle-aged man stiffened and twitched the top of his lips, wishing to slap himself.

Fuck, why could he not kick the habit of running his mouth?

His ancestors were all reduced to fucking ashes. Where could he get their blood?

"Little fellow, what's the plan? Who should stay behind, you or me?" Jiang Hongyan turned to Xu Que and smiled mildly.

It was apparent that she felt a need for someone to stay behind, to protect Xu Feifei.

"Hehe, you should, of course, leave the heavy lifting to me! Little missy, don't even think of stealing my kill!" Xu Que laughed and narrowed his eyes, directing his gaze towards the Blood Sea in front of them.

At the same time, in the Ghost King Palace in the middle of the Blood Sea.

An old man sat at the high seat in the main hall, his expression gloomy as he grasped the metal handrest tightly with all ten fingers. The handrest had long become deformed.

It was clear that the old man was the master of the Ghost King Palace, the evergreen Gold Level Stronghouse -- Boss Li.

"Rascal! You keep bringing trouble to me all day long! Forget the fact that you guys keep wreaking havoc in the Secon Realm. How dare you provoke the people of the First Realm and lead them here?" Boss Li tore into a younger man as he glared in utmost fury.

Defiance piled up on the young man's face. He answered casually, "Father, it has got nothing to do with me this time, I swear! Those two bitches were obviously after the ultra-rare treasure on me!"

"Hmph! What have you got on you that was worth robbing except for that Magic Fighting Weapon of yours?" scoffed Boss Li.

"Report!"

A sudden holler came from outside the house.

Right after, a guard hurriedly rushed into the house and fell on his knees, trembling in fear, "Master, the First Young Master was beaten up is now in the hands of that scoundrel! That scoundrel seemed to have the strength of a Gold Level fighter. He's in cahoots with those two women!"

"What?" Boss Li jumped from his seat, completely mad, "Scum, how dare he beat my son up at my door? Who is he?"

"I don't know. That man looked young but was almost as strong as a Golden Level fighter. I'm afraid that he might be a genius from the First Realm!" the guard answered fawningly.

"A young genius?" Boss Li paused, and his expression slowly became severe.

If they had offended a longtime Gold Level powerhouse, he could heck it all and just go up against them head to head.

However, if they had offended a young genius, an existence at the Gold Level, it's highly likely that this man might hail from one of the greatest sects of the First Realm!

Should he be slightly careless and anger that great sect and cause them to chase them down as a faction, he would be doomed even if he had two lives!

"This is bad, unfilial sons... ..." Boss Li was beyond angry, yet he could not bear to punch his children for real. He swished his sleeves and huffed, Forget it. Follow me to meet that young fellow. With my reputation, they would need to give me some face."

As he said that, Boss Li made his way out. The young man hesitated for a moment and eventually followed him out.

Soon, the two exited the palace with a few guards. Boss Li waved his hand, and a portion of Miasma atop the Blood Sea fell away almost instantly. The sight cleared up.

He immediately saw Xu Que, Jiang Hongyan and their companions at the other side of the Blood Sea. He called out, "Young man, I am Li Yuan. Which sect or faction are you guys from?"

"Ah, Father, save me, Father! I'm dying!" Before Xu Que could respond, the middle-aged man lying on the ground began to yell heartbreakingly.

"Bam!"

Xu Que exerted more pressure under his feet and gave that middle-aged man a solid stomp. He glared, "Behave, and stop screaming!"

"Ah... ..." the middle-aged man shrieked instantly. He could not hold it in this time, as all bones in his ribs were broken.

"Stop!" Boss Li darkened once he saw what was happening. He warned loudly, "Young man, you'd better not push it. I, li Yuan, is no pushover. Just tell me what you want, and stop tormenting my son."

"Father, stop talking nonsense! Quick, make your second son hand over the bone ashes of our ancestors! This brother here simply wanted some bone ash. We'll just give it to him!" yelled the middle-aged man, unable to wait any longer.

Boss Li was stunned. Bone ash?

What joke was that? How could they hand over the ashes of Li ancestors to an outsider?

"Atrocious! You good-for-nothing son, are you trying to send me to my grave?" Boss Li was immediately enraged as he roared at the middle-aged man, sending him death glares.

The middle-aged son too became anxious and shouted, "Father, it's obvious that my life is more important than a can of bone ashes! I'm about to die here!"

"Die? You won't!" Boss Li yelled, "Young man, I can't possibly hand you the bone ashes of Li ancestors. Name me other conditions!"

"Don't wanna!" Xu Que replied curtly.

A surprised Boss Li took a double-take, as if he heard him wrong, "What?"

Xu Que repeated with an expression of a tsundere, "I don't wanna!"

"... ..."

Boss Li's face darkened visibly.

Everyone else also flinched, unable to formulate a response.

Just say no, please! Why are you acting cute like a tsundere?

"Young man, don't tell me that you truly intend to become arch enemies with the Ghost King Palace? Should my son die, I assure you that the three of you, and those two dogs, will never walk out of the Ghost King Market alive." scoffed Boss Li.

"Fuck!"

All of a sudden, Buttface and the toy poodle flew into a rage.

"Fuck you! Are you blind? I'm a wolf, not a dog!"

"Hell, I'm a snake, a Nine-Headed Gigantic Snake! Not a dog!"

The two dogs screeched angrily, gnarling and snapping loudly.

Everyone present was dumbfounded.

Wolf? And a snake?

Hell, do they dare to be even more fucking ridiculous?

"All right, all right, stop flaunting that pathetic stuff of yours! Don't be so dramatic, can't you see that we're discussing something serious right now?" Xu Que rolled his eyes. He then stopped Buttface and the toy poodle from snatching his part.

Buttface couldn't swallow the humiliation, "What pathetic stuff? That's my moral stand. I'm a wolf!"

"That's right!" the toy poodle nodded in agreement.

Xu Que ignored them and swept his gaze towards Boss Li, who was standing at the other shore of the Blood Sea. He smiled slightly, "Little Li, don't you know that we, the Heavenly Explosion Faction, are afraid of everything except threats? Eh, what's that expression for? Don't you believe me? Okay, okay, I'll kill one for you to see then!"

The moment he finished his sentence, Xu Que suddenly raised his foot and brought it down heavily towards the middle-aged man's chest.

chapters.title: Chapter 991 - The Red Light!
chapters.body:
Chapter 991 - The Red Light!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Swish!

Instantly, the old man was stunned. The woman in black beside him was also struck dumb!

The invincible ancient overbearing mosquito?

Don’t try to fool us!

Could you use a more sophisticated name? Nobody will be fooled by this shabby name!

“Old man, come on, I’ve sensed my internal force can’t control it anymore. Just take out the map, so that I can whack this damn mosquito with it!” Xu Que shouted with difficulty as his face turned pale. The old man and the woman in black were so annoyed that they almost spat blood when they saw Xu Que acting apparently serious.

“Bastard! What are you doing? Just release my grandpa!” The woman in black scolded angrily.

The old man frowned and said seriously, “Young man, this is just so unscrupulous! I tried to cooperate with you sincerely. How could you do this to me?”

“I haven’t sensed any sincerity, which is the basis of cooperation, from you. Do you think I am just a three-year-old boy? Did you think I would bite any bait you threw at me?” Xu Que sneered.

If the old man had taken out the map, Xu Que would really have considered it cooperation. However, up until now, all the information provided by the old man was just a one-sided story. As a cultivator who had survived in the World of Cultivators for so many years, Xu Que would never believe others easily unless he could see the evidence with his own eyes.

Moreover, the old man didn’t want to take out the map, which meant he didn’t trust Xu Que. In this way, how could Xu Que trust the old man?

Howl! “Little brat, let me make a body search!” Buttface rushed up at this time and tried to search the old man recklessly.

The old man’s expression changed. He had seen this dog kick the Elder Young Master of the Ghost King Palace to death, which meant this dog was reckless. If the dog searched him with too much force, he would also be killed, which was something he didn’t want.

“Stop! I can take out the map myself!” The old man shouted.

“Grandpa, you….” the woman in black said hurriedly.

“It doesn’t matter! I believe this young man won’t eat his words!” The old man replied with a calm smile. Actually, he was lying through his teeth. He didn’t believe Xu Que would keep faith. Also he knew clearly that his business would only be slightly influenced even if he took out the map, so it was not as important as all that.

After all, he knew the route clearly. When the Refined Moon Palace was opened, he would go directly to the Ice Valley. If Xu Que also wanted to go there, he would melt the Ice Valley to clear the way. Then the old man could also go to the Ice Valley by following Xu Que.

“Holy crap! I thought he was an expert! I didn’t expect that he would be intimidated by my mighty power! Alas! I am just too powerful!” Buttface was quite disappointed when the old man was scared by his power and chose to be cooperative.

At this time, the old man had taken out the map. It was quite old and ripped in places where the incomplete route was printed.

“What?” Xu Que was stunned when he saw the map. He said, squinting his eyes, “It is on human skin! Old man, don’t tell me you got it from someone’s body!”

“Exactly!” The old man admitted it directly. “Indeed, it is on human skin, and I got it from a guy’s body personally. However, when I did that, the man had died!”

“Oh? How did the man die?” Xu Que asked with a smile.

The old man shook his head, “It had nothing to do with me. This guy was attacked by a trap in the Refined Moon Palace. He fell on a giant burning rock, where the map of the Refined Moon Palace was carved. Therefore, part of the map was printed on his chest. When I found him, he was already dead!”

“A giant burning rock? Why didn’t you put out the fire on the rock, so that you could get the complete map?” Xu Que asked.

The old man replied with a wry smile, “Young man, if you saw that rock, you wouldn’t say that! At that time, I approached that rock with nine other people. In the end, only I survived. That rock is surrounded by all kinds of traps. It is even protected by the Giant Rock Golems, which are at least as powerful as you!”

“Really?” Xu Que replied with a faint smile, ignoring the old man’s words. Because the old man knew nothing about his strength at all! He had killed Boss Li with the Flame Devouring Wave and the Buddha’s Fiery Lotus. If he used his most powerful magic art to throw out a Five Elements Mountain, the old man would be scared out of his wits!

The old man saw Xu Que kill Boss Li. Now he said that the Giant Rock Golems were as powerful as Xu Que, which meant those golems should at least have reached the summit of the Form Synthesis Stage or even the summit of the Crossing Calamity Stage!

“OK! I’ve remembered the map. I’ll see you outside the Refined Moon Palace in two days!” Xu Que memorized the route and told the old man with a smile. Since he had decided to enter the Refined Moon Palace, he didn’t care how many people would go with him. Anyway, he would take anything he wanted, which could never be taken away by others.

“OK! Thank you, young man! I’ll see you in two days!” The old man said with a smile.

Xu Que didn’t waste any more words. He jumped up into the sky, stepping on lightning. Then he went back to the First Realm with Jiang Hongyan and his teammates. Seeing them leaving, the woman in black asked in a low voice as she turned to the old man, “Grandpa, you are as powerful as he is! Why didn’t you capture him just now?”

“Heh, heh, he will be startled if I expose my strength too early. The current situation is just I want!” The old man smiled as the light of wisdom flashed in his eyes.

…..

At the same time, in the sky, Jiang Hongyan said with a faint smile as she looked at Xu Que, “That old man was at least at Level 5 of the Great Vehicle Stage!”

“I know!” Xu Que said with a smile. “He tried to disguise himself to beat me! But I am not ordinary! At the very least, I am a dragon!”

Howl! “Little brat, what do you mean? Stop insulting the dragon race!” Buttface said angrily after hearing Xu Que’s words.

“Damn! Buttface, you want a good smack, right? You are more and more arrogant!” Xu Que said.

Buttface puffed out his cheat and said sturdily, “Nobody should insult the dragon race! As an unyielding and hot-blooded cultivator, I fear neither Heaven nor Earth…. Howl! Howl! Ouch! Ouch! Ouch! “It hurts so much! I’m dying! I’m dying! I was wrong!”

They drifted away, clamoring loudly.

…..

On the second day, Xu Que and his team landed outside First Realm City. They were ushered in by the Dong Family immediately. The old woman didn’t show up. Xu Que didn’t want to chat with her anyway. In the night, he slipped into Jiang Hongyan’s room. Xu Feifei had already gone to bed. Jiang Hongyan was performing cultivation by sitting on the bed with her legs crossed. When she saw Xu Que, she opened her eyes slightly. Xu Que sat beside her with a smile and started to chat. He mentioned the old woman in the Celestial Realm.

Hearing that, Jiang Hongyan was quite surprised. She didn’t realize there were so many stages after the Great Vehicle Stage, including the Half Celestial Realm, the Human Celestial Realm, the Earth Celestial Realm, the Heaven Celestial Realm, and the Golden Celestial Realm. The entire Celestial Realm was really a long route to cultivation.

“We still have a long way to go in the cultivation! When will we reach the end of it?” Jiang Hongyan sighed after a moment’s silence.

Xu Que shook his head for he didn’t know when they would end their cultivation. He didn’t think about the future like Jiang Hongyan did. Anyway, his purpose was quite simple—being immortal! Moreover, he hoped he could live happily forever!

The night was not long. Xu Que fell asleep by placing his head on Jiang Hongyan’s leg. At daybreak, Xu Que was awakened by the noisy members of the Dong Family. When he opened his eyes, he saw Jiang Hongyan’s extremely beautiful face. However, she was staring out the window seriously.

Xu Que turned to the window and was stunned by what he saw. The sky was filled with red light! This blood-red color came from a half-moon in the sky!

…..

chapters.title: Chapter 998 - I Want To Convince Them!
chapters.body:
Chapter 998 - I Want To Convince Them!

Chapter 998 I Want To Convince Them!

At this moment, the corridor was dead silent. The old woman was standing there in a daze and couldn’t believe her eyes. This couple had been two powerhouses of the Half Celestial Realm. Even she couldn’t guarantee that she could kill both of them. But they had been knocked unconscious easily by a young man at the Form Synthesis Stage. Nobody would believe that!

“Little brat, you are too much! Couldn’t you just knock them down directly? As an upright cultivator, I will kill all my enemies like breaking dead branches from a tree!” Buttface walked over with his paws behind his back, making his comments proudly.

Xu Que raised his black rod immediately. However, before he smashed down the rod, Buttface shouted hurriedly, “Holy crap! Please don’t do that! I am on your side! The Exploding Heavens Faction is awesome! You are so handsome!”

“Nonsense! Can’t I only be described as handsome?” Xu Que said angrily.

Buttface shouted in terror, “Right! You are just handsome and nothing else!”

“Alas! Buttface, you are always so honest and frank!” Xu Que lowered his rod and sighed, shaking his head.

The rest of the people who were watching were speechless after seeing that. They were not as shocked as the old woman was when Xu Que knocked down that couple. That couple was knocked down before they had time to fight back. A lot of people didn’t know their strength so they didn’t realize how shocking it was what Xu Que had done.

However, Elder Yu was different. She knew the old woman’s strength clearly. The old woman could have only defeated that couple through ambush. But they were knocked unconscious by Xu Que easily. Therefore, Elder Yu was also extremely shocked at this moment. Now Elder Yu’s attitude toward Xu Que had become more and more reverent.

Jiang Hongyan was as calm as usual. She was used to the miracles created by Xu Que. She would believe that Xu Que could knock down a cultivator at the Human Celestial Realm now, let alone cultivators at the Half Celestial Realm.

“How…how did you do that?” The old woman, who had come to herself, asked as she looked at Xu Que at this time.

“I just took them by surprise and struck when they were unprepared. This is the essence of ambush! Just remember, from now on, you owe me tuition. You should serve me for eight years….”

Puff! “No, you owe me eight Celestial Artifacts!” Xu Que said with a smile.

The old woman’s expression changed and she was embarrassed and didn’t know what to say. After all, she had not expected that Xu Que could defeat cultivators at the Half Celestial Realm. Now he had done what he said he would do, and she had nothing to say in response. As for eight Celestial Artifacts…. She couldn’t even find four Celestial Artifacts by searching all the Jade Lake. She would never find so many Celestial Artifacts.

I’m afraid I can never pay off this debt!

The old woman closed her mouth and didn’t say anything as if nothing had happened. She knew that if she could obtain the 3-Stripe Spiritual Tao Stone, she would realize a breakthrough. Then she would leave this world and the debt would also cease to exist.

“How would you deal with these two people?” Xu Que looked up and asked the old woman at this time.

“I would kill them so none of them survive. Otherwise, if they go back to the World of Near Celestial, they will seek revenge against us together with their comrades. At that time, none of us could survive!” The old woman said seriously.

Gasp! Xu Que gasped. Then he said, perplexed, “I…I don’t think this is a good idea. After all, these are two lives. How could you kill them so casually? I suggest we could help and influence them with love!”

“What?” Hearing that, Buttface’s eyes grew wide with shock.

Jiang Hongyan was also slightly stunned and she looked at Xu Que in surprise.

Two lives? We can’t kill them casually? We should help and influence them with love? When did this guy change his nature? Is he going to play tricks again?

“Holy crap! Little brat, have you been bewitched? Come here and let me perform exorcism for you!” Buttface shouted immediately.

“Nonsense! Why do you like fighting and killing? It is totally unacceptable! Heaven cherishes life. A case involving human life should be treated with the utmost care! We can never kill any living things casually!” Xu Que said in a righteous way.

The old woman said with a cold smile, “These two people killed millions of people. If you don’t kill them, you will have big trouble in the future!”

“I don’t care! If someone has to take the tough stuff, let me do it!” Xu Que said earnestly, shaking his head.

A lot of apprentices of the Leaving Leaves Sect were shocked by his words.

If someone has to take the tough stuff, let me do it! He is so great! I didn’t expect Lord Wang would be so merciful! After subduing his opponents, he even decides to spare their lives! Moreover, he knows this will bring big troubles to him in the future, but he still does it fearlessly!

“He is really a living saint!”

“What a noble spirit!”

“We are so ashamed of ourselves!”

“At this moment, I realize what kind of person Lord Wang is!”

Many apprentices of the Leaving Leaves Sect exclaimed.

Only Elder Yu was still quite dubious for she didn’t believe Xu Que was a person like that!

He is neither a noble person nor a living saint at all! No living saint could raid a woman’s chest! No noble person could cheat others! This guy is absolutely a rascal!

“Wang Dachui, are you sure you want me to spare their lives?” The old woman asked dubiously as she looked at Xu Que at this time. Apparently, she also didn’t believe Xu Que could be so merciful.

Xu Que nodded his head sturdily, “Exactly! Please spare their lives for the sake of the Exploding Heavens Faction! People shall not kill each other!”

“Heh, heh, I’m afraid you should ask them. If you don’t kill them, the first thing they will do when they come to life is to kill you!” The old woman said with a cold smile.

“I could convince them with kindness and generosity!” Xu Que said righteously as he placed his hands behind his back.

“Convince them?” The old woman was amused by his reply. She shook her head because she had never seen such an innocent and naive person as he was. Then she said with a cold smile, “Fine! I just want to see how you will convince them!”

“No problem! Ten Celestial Artifacts for one course! And I will still give you a 20 percent discount. Is that OK for you?” Xu Que said as he looked at the old woman.

The old woman was stunned. Then she squinted her eyes and smiled to herself. Are you going to coax away my Celestial Artifacts again? Humph! I just don’t believe you could convince those two evil creatures!

“OK! However, if you can’t convince them, the eight Celestial Artifacts I owe you will be written off!” The old woman said, nodding her head.

“OK!” Xu Que smiled immediately. The next moment, he walked up to that couple and raised his arms. Glow appeared on his fingertips, which was the threadlike Taoist Connotation.

Swish!

He waved his hand. The threadlike Taoist Connotation crisscrossed and formed many chains, which landed on the body of that couple and tied them up.

“Wang Dachui, you are too fanciful! Your Taoist Connotation can’t tie them up!” The old woman couldn’t help but say.

“It doesn’t matter! I’m just making a pose. I don’t care whether it could tie them up or not. What I really want is to convince them about my great love!” Xu Que said with a faint smile like a saint.

The apprentices of the Leaving Leaves Sect couldn’t help but show their respect for him.

“Humph! I suggest you avoid drawing fire against yourself!” The old woman snorted. If Xu Que didn’t kill them, they would make big troubles when they came to life.

Whoosh!

Just at this moment, two green pills flew into the mouths of that couple from Xu Que’s hand.

“Stop! What are you doing?” The old woman shouted in surprise. She could clearly sense the aura of those two pills, which were used to induce resuscitation. She didn’t expect that Xu Que would awaken that couple.

Boom!

The pills took effect immediately after flying into their mouths. The man and the woman who were lying on the ground opened their eyes abruptly. Then magnificent momentum gushed out from their bodies, which crushed the Taoist Connotation chains of Xu Que instantly. The area was filled with their magnificent kill intent.

“Guys, you have come around at last! Just now a dragon knocked you unconscious!” Xu Que walked up with a smile.

“Little bastard, you are seeking death! How dare you attack us secretly?” When they saw Xu Que, they were annoyed immediately. They waved their hands and the wind came out from their palms and dashed toward Xu Que like sharp swords.

“Hey, hey, hey! Don’t do that! Please listen to me!” Xu Que dodged their attack by stepping on lightning as he continued to try to persuade them.

The old woman’s face turned dark. Apparently, the situation was worsening. She hadn’t had time to stop Xu Que from awakening that couple.

“Just die!” The man and the woman jumped up from the ground. They ignored the rest of the people in this area. They lowered their arms and all the dust in the air was turned into small flying cutters, which flew toward Xu Que like a sudden downpour.

“What the hell? Please listen to me!” Xu Que shouted helplessly as he dodged the attack again.

“Humph! You refused to follow my suggestion. Now I’ll see how you save the situation!” The old woman snorted. Now she was about to help Xu Que. After all, if Xu Que was killed, it was impossible for her to get the 3-Stripe Spiritual Tao Stone.

“Damn!” Xu Que cursed angrily.

Whoosh!

The next moment, he waved his hand to undo the buttons on his robe. Suddenly, dozens of Beast Soul Bags appeared.

“Open!” He applied floral water to his body as he opened all the Beast Soul Bags. Magnificent Taoist Connotation gushed out from his fingertips, which was turned into many threads. Then all those threadlike Taoist Connotation gushed into the Beast Soul Bags.

Along with a dull sound, the void trembled a bit. Numerous threadlike Taoist Connotations were pulled out by a magnificent force. After that, the entire corridor was covered by a cloud of black fog. Millions of Heaven-Devouring Demonic Mosquitoes, which were pulled by Xu Que through the threadlike Taoist Connotation, were trying their best to fly forward by showing their sharp teeth and waggling their wings crazily.

“Are…these…?” The old woman widened her eyes immediately. “The Heaven-Devouring Demonic Mosquitoes?”

The man and the woman turned pale from shock on the spot.

“Humph!” At this time, a snort could be heard.

Behind those thickly dotted Heaven-Devouring Demonic Mosquitoes, Xu Que said coldly as he looked at the man and the woman, “I’ve asked you to listen to me many times. Why didn’t you listen to me? Now, kneel down and tell me whether you’ve been convinced!”
